failure.message: cerberus.schema.SchemaError: {'$defs': [{'decision_point_group': ['unknown rule'], 'schemaVersion': ['unknown rule']}], '$id': ['must be of dict type'], '$ref': ['must be of dict type'], '$schema': ['must be of dict type'], 'title': ['must be of dict type']}
